understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' on each level while avoiding spike tiles, using exactly the provided movement, click, and undo actions within the turn limits.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is strictly horizontal via MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT; gravity then pulls the player in the current direction until landing. Clicks remove breakable blocks without advancing gravity. Landing on spikes ends the attempt. Each level provides two 50-turn attempts; UNDO can revert the last action.
